Fig. 3: Path planning with uncertainty: (a) for each ocean model in our ensemble, deterministic path planning identifies a path that minimizes the vehicle’s travel-time; (b) the optimal mean-time path from xS to xE minimizes the mean travel-time of the vehicle; this path is potentially distinct from the family of deterministic optimal paths displayed in (a).
